name: Online therapy and counseling
summary: Subscription-based online therapy platforms (BetterHelp, Talkspace, Cerebral, etc.), $45-$120/week.

evidence.claim: FTC 2023 enforcement action against BetterHelp: $7.8M settlement for sharing user health data with Facebook, Snapchat, Pinterest, and Criteo for advertising despite promising confidentiality.

HHS OCR 2024 guidance on HIPAA applicability to online therapy: platforms acting as Business Associates must have Business Associate Agreements; many consumer-marketed platforms disclaim BA status by framing service as non-medical 'coaching'.
APA (American Psychological Association) guidance distinguishing licensed psychotherapy from life-coaching: state licensure required for therapy diagnosis and treatment, not required for coaching.

criteria.name: provider_licensure_state_verified
criteria.notes: Licensed therapist in the user's state (E3). Coaching-only platforms are not therapy.

criteria.name: hipaa_compliant
criteria.notes: Signed HIPAA Business Associate Agreement required for therapy (E2). Many 'coaching' platforms disclaim BA status.

criteria.name: insurance_accepted
criteria.notes: Some platforms are out-of-network only; check before enrolling.

criteria.name: data_sharing_to_advertisers
criteria.notes: BetterHelp $7.8M FTC settlement cited sharing health data with Meta/Snap/Pinterest (E1).

criteria.name: cancellation_friction
criteria.notes: FTC click-to-cancel + CA SB-313 apply; check for dark-pattern/forced-continuity.

confabulationPatterns.reality: Many platforms are 'HIPAA-adjacent' — they use encryption but do not sign Business Associate Agreements with users' downstream providers (E2). True HIPAA compliance requires a BA chain, not just encrypted transport.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Does the platform sign a HIPAA Business Associate Agreement on request, or does it disclaim BA status?

confabulationPatterns.pattern: connect with a therapist in minutes
confabulationPatterns.reality: Speed of match does not equal quality. Many platforms match to 'coaches' (not licensed therapists) for speed; licensed therapists have 1-2 week wait lists (E3).
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Is the matched provider a licensed therapist in the user's state, or a coach?

confabulationPatterns.reality: Weekly price typically requires 4-week minimum prepay ($260+ up-front). Month-to-month pricing is usually 30-50% higher. Insurance-covered traditional therapy may be cheaper out-of-pocket.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Is the cited weekly price the prepay price, and how does it compare to insurance copay at a traditional practice?

confabulationPatterns.reality: BetterHelp was fined $7.8M in 2023 for sharing user health data with Meta, Snap, Pinterest, and Criteo (E1). Cerebral settled separately for similar violations. 'Private' requires specific audit — check the privacy policy for third-party ad-tech integrations.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Does the privacy policy disclose any data sharing with advertising platforms (Meta Pixel, Google Analytics, TikTok Pixel)?

compatibilityQuestions: Do you need diagnosis and medication, or general talk support? Diagnosis requires licensed therapist or psychiatrist, not coach.
Insurance coverage? In-network traditional therapy can be $15-$40/visit copay.
Modality preference: messaging-only, live video, or mix?

typicalHiddenCosts.name: Switching therapists often requires account restart

representativeSkus.name: BetterHelp Weekly Subscription
representativeSkus.notes: FTC $7.8M settlement for data sharing (E1); disclaims HIPAA BA. Out-of-network only.

representativeSkus.name: Talkspace Standard Messaging + Live
representativeSkus.notes: In-network with many major insurers; signs HIPAA BA.

representativeSkus.name: Open Path Collective (in-person sliding scale)
representativeSkus.notes: Nonprofit directory — $30-$60/session sliding scale. One-time $65 membership.

representativeSkus.name: Traditional in-network therapy (insurance copay)
representativeSkus.notes: Baseline comparison — most insured users pay $15-$40/visit; often cheaper than subscription apps.
